news.t: Horizon Caps 2025 Buildout of ETF Lineup with Launch of Three Actively Managed Funds Providing Variety of Domestic and International Exposures

holdings.infoBox: SMOX is an equity ETF with a total of 298 individual holdings. The top holdings are First American Government Obligations Fund Class X stock at 1.30%, Flex Ltd. at 1.29%, TD SYNNEX at 1.28%, Curtiss-Wright at 1.24%, and TechnipFMC at 1.17%.

overview.description: The Horizon Small/Mid Cap Core Equity ETF (SMOX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in various mid- and small-cap US companies. The fund employs tactical options overlay strategies. SMOX was launched on Dec 2, 2025 and is issued by Horizon Kinetics.

data.text: International Equity ETF (FRGN), Small/Mid Cap Core Equity ETF (SMOX), and International Managed Risk ETF (SFTX) join the firm's lineup of goals-based solutions, bringing the firm's ETF lineup to 12 f...
